blended.narrative: Howelsen Hill is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,502 ft. Mild temps with highs near 57°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
